# dating.fit_poisson_spline { #tspaint.dating.fit_poisson_spline }

```python
tspaint.dating.fit_poisson_spline(
    centers,
    events,
    exposure,
    lam,
    n_knots=25,
    degree=3,
    order=2,
    max_iter=60,
    tol=1e-07,
)
```

Penalised Poisson log-spline via penalised IRLS.

Model ``events ~ Poisson(exposure · exp(B β))`` with 2nd-difference penalty ``λ βᵀPβ``.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**centers**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(n_cells,) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Cell-centre times; the B-spline basis is built on ``log(centers)``.

<code>[**events**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(n_cells,) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per-cell event counts — the Poisson response (e.g. directional jumps ``J[:, m, n]``).

<code>[**exposure**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(n_cells,) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per-cell exposure / offset (occupation ``D[:, m]``); the Poisson mean is ``exposure · exp(Bβ)``. Cells with ``exposure <= 0`` are dropped from the fit.

<code>[**lam**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Roughness-penalty weight ``λ`` (larger ⇒ smoother).

<code>[**n_knots**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [25]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of B-spline knots on log-time. Default ``25``.

<code>[**degree**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [3]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   B-spline degree. Default ``3`` (cubic).

<code>[**order**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [2]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Order of the difference penalty (``2`` = second-difference roughness). Default ``2``.

<code>[**max_iter**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [60]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Maximum penalised-IRLS iterations. Default ``60``.

<code>[**tol**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1e-07]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Convergence tolerance on the max coefficient change between iterations. Default ``1e-7``.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[**rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(n_cells,) ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Fitted rate ``exp(Bβ)`` at the cell centres.

<code>[**edf**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Effective degrees of freedom (trace of the smoother hat matrix) — for GCV.

<code>[**beta**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(ncoef,) ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Fitted B-spline coefficients ``β``.
